securityControls.title: Configure ALL machine-based information resources to limit inbound and outbound traffic
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.

securityControls.title: Design systems to minimize the attack surface and minimize lateral movement if compromised
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.

securityControls.title: Use logical networking and related capabilities to enforce traffic flow controls
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.

securityControls.title: Use immutable infrastructure with strictly defined functionality and privileges by default
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.

securityControls.title: Protect against denial of service attacks and unwanted spam
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.

securityControls.title: Design systems for high availability and rapid recovery
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.

securityControls.title: Ensure cloud-native information resources are implemented based on host provider's best practices and documented guidance
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.

securityControls.title: Continuously evaluate machine-based information resources for opportunities to improve security
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Encrypt or otherwise secure network traffic
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Encrypt information at rest by default
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Manage configuration of machine-based information resources using automation
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Use cryptographic methods to validate the integrity of machine-based information resources
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Use automated key management systems to manage, protect, and _regularly_ rotate digital keys and certificates
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Use a consistent, risk-informed approach for applying security patches
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) using methods that are difficult to intercept or impersonate (phishing-resistant MFA) for all user authentication
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.

securityControls.title: Use secure passwordless methods for user authentication and authorization when feasible, otherwise enforce strong passwords with MFA
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.

securityControls.title: Enforce appropriately secure authentication methods for non-user accounts and services
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.

securityControls.title: Use a least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time security authorization model for all user and non-user accounts and services
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.

securityControls.title: Design identity and access management systems that assume resources will be compromised
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.

securityControls.title: Automatically disable or otherwise secure accounts with privileged access in response to suspicious activity
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.

securityControls.title: Operate a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) or similar system(s) for centralized, tamper-resistent logging of events, activities, and changes
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will monitor, log, and audit all important events, activity, and changes.

securityControls.title: Regularly review and audit logs
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will monitor, log, and audit all important events, activity, and changes.

securityControls.title: Rapidly detect and respond to vulnerabilities following requirements and recommendations in the FedRAMP Vulnerability Response and Detection standard
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will monitor, log, and audit all important events, activity, and changes.

securityControls.title: Perform Infrastructure as Code and configuration evaluation and testing
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will monitor, log, and audit all important events, activity, and changes.

securityControls.title: Log and monitor service modifications
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all system changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.

securityControls.title: Execute changes through redeployment of version controlled immutable resources rather than direct modification wherever possible
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all system changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.

securityControls.title: Implement persistent automated testing and validation of changes
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all system changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.

securityControls.title: Consistently follow a documented change management procedure
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all system changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.

securityControls.title: Evaluate the risk and potential impact of any change
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all system changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.

securityControls.title: Generate inventories of information resources from authoritative sources
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

securityControls.title: Document the security objectives and requirements for each information resource
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

securityControls.title: Maintain a vulnerability disclosure program
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

securityControls.title: Build security and privacy considerations into the Software Development Lifecycle and align with CISA Secure By Design principles
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

securityControls.title: Document methods used to evaluate information resource implementations
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

securityControls.title: Have staff and budget for security commensurate with the size, complexity, scope, executive priorities, and risk of the service offering that demonstrates commitment to delivering a secure service.
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

securityControls.title: Document risk management decisions for software supply chain security
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

securityControls.title: Follow the requirements and recommendations in the FedRAMP Minimum Assessment Standard regarding third-party information resources
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will understand, monitor, and manage supply chain risks from third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Identify and prioritize mitigation of potential supply chain risks
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will understand, monitor, and manage supply chain risks from third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Monitor third party software information resources for upstream vulnerabilities, with contractual notification requirements or active monitoring services
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will understand, monitor, and manage supply chain risks from third-party information resources.

securityControls.title: Ensure all employees receive security and privacy awareness training, incident response training, and are familiar with all relevant policies and procedures.
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service provider will continuously educate their employees on cybersecurity measures, testing them regularly to ensure their knowledge is satisfactory.

securityControls.title: Require role-specific training for high risk roles, including at least roles with privileged access
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service provider will continuously educate their employees on cybersecurity measures, testing them regularly to ensure their knowledge is satisfactory.

securityControls.title: Define Recovery Time Objectives (RTO) and Recovery Point Objectives (RPO)
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will define, maintain, and test incident response plan(s) and recovery capabilities to ensure minimal service disruption and data loss during incidents and contingencies.

securityControls.title: Develop and maintain a recovery plan that aligns with the defined recovery objectives
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will define, maintain, and test incident response plan(s) and recovery capabilities to ensure minimal service disruption and data loss during incidents and contingencies.

securityControls.title: Perform system backups aligned with recovery objectives
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will define, maintain, and test incident response plan(s) and recovery capabilities to ensure minimal service disruption and data loss during incidents and contingencies.

securityControls.title: Regularly test the capability to recover from incidents and contingencies
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will define, maintain, and test incident response plan(s) and recovery capabilities to ensure minimal service disruption and data loss during incidents and contingencies.

securityControls.title: Respond to incidents according to FedRAMP requirements and cloud service provider policies
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will document, report, and analyze security incidents to ensure regulatory compliance and continuous security improvement.

securityControls.title: Maintain a log of incidents and periodically review past incidents for patterns or vulnerabilities
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will document, report, and analyze security incidents to ensure regulatory compliance and continuous security improvement.

securityControls.title: Generate after action reports and regularly incorporate lessons learned into operations
securityControls.description: A secure cloud service offering will document, report, and analyze security incidents to ensure regulatory compliance and continuous security improvement.

securityControls.title: Require role-specific training for development and engineering staff covering best practices for delivering secure software.
securityControls.description: Require role-specific training for development and engineering staff covering best practices for delivering secure software.

securityControls.title: Securely manage the lifecycle and privileges of all accounts, roles, and groups.
securityControls.description: Securely manage the lifecycle and privileges of all accounts, roles, and groups.

securityControls.title: Maintain a list of information resources and event types that will be monitored, logged, and audited.
securityControls.description: Maintain a list of information resources and event types that will be monitored, logged, and audited.

securityControls.title: Use automated services to persistently assess the security posture of all services and automatically enforce secure operations.
securityControls.description: Use automated services to persistently assess the security posture of all services and automatically enforce secure operations.

securityControls.title: Use a least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time access authorization model for access to log data.
securityControls.description: Use a least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time access authorization model for access to log data.

securityControls.title: Ensure that changes do not introduce or leave behind residual elements that could negatively affect confidentiality, integrity, or availability of information resources.
securityControls.description: Ensure that changes do not introduce or leave behind residual elements that could negatively affect confidentiality, integrity, or availability of information resources.

securityControls.title: Use mechanisms that continuously validate the authenticity and integrity of communications between information resources.
securityControls.description: Use mechanisms that continuously validate the authenticity and integrity of communications between information resources.

securityControls.title: Remove unwanted information promptly, including from backups if appropriate.
securityControls.description: Remove unwanted information promptly, including from backups if appropriate.

catalog.title: FedRAMP Key Security Indicators v2
catalog.description: FedRAMPs Key Security Indicators summarize the security capabilities expected of a cloud service provider who wishes to obtain and maintain a FedRAMP 20x authorization. These capabilities are broadly summarized with the expectation of broad automated application.
